app.name: Architectly
app.footer: Developed by Ahmet FATİHOĞLU — MIT LICENSE © 2026

welcome.title: Turn a rough idea into a {{grad}} BRD or PRD.
welcome.sub: Architectly interviews you step by step — asking the right questions in the right order — then assembles a structured requirements document aligned with industry best practices.

features.guidedDesc: Step-by-step questions, branched by document type.
features.aiDesc: Professional docs via Puter.js, no API key.
features.editDesc: Click any section to refine with AI.

welcome.pickerSub: The question set adapts to your selection.
welcome.prdDesc: User stories, features, technical specs for product teams.
welcome.brdDesc: Business goals, ROI, stakeholders for executive review.
welcome.noLibrary: Your library is empty. Generate a document to start building your collection.

interview.reviewAssumptionHint: Review the AI-generated assumption above. Edit if needed, then confirm.
interview.completeSub: We've collected enough to draft your {{docType}}. Review your answers below, or generate now.

title.withSuggestion: Based on your overview, what should we call this project?
title.withSuggestionHelp: We suggested a name from your description — keep it or change it.
title.fallback: What should we call this project?

generating.title: Crafting your document
generating.sub: The AI is synthesizing your answers into a structured {{docType}}.

refineModal.title: Refine: {{heading}}
refineModal.label: What should change?
refineModal.placeholder: e.g. Make it more concise, add edge cases, convert to bullet list…

library.title: Library
library.sub: Your saved documents (max 100). Stored in your browser.
library.search: Search by title, type, or content…
library.deleteConfirm: Delete this document? This cannot be undone.

errors.aiUnavailable: AI generation failed — using offline template. {{detail}}
errors.assumeFailed: Could not generate an assumption for "{{title}}…". The question was skipped.
errors.libraryFull: Library is full. Oldest document was removed to make room.
errors.confirmStartOver: Leave and clear your interview? Your progress will be lost.
errors.confirmNewDoc: Start a new document? Your current work will be cleared.
